name: Default Theme
intendedUse: the unskinned default — what a new app points at before a theme is chosen
description: Deliberately grayscale (zero chroma) so an unthemed app reads as clearly UNSKINNED, not finished. Medium gray canvas with lighter gray surfaces and a gray highlight accent — NOT a black-on-white paper look. This is the standing default pointer: new apps use it until a real theme is swapped in. If your app is still gray, it hasn't been themed yet.
